children.name: Apple-Cinnamon Porridge — Mild-Spice Plate
children.short_description: Creamy, mildly spiced apple-cinnamon porridge made with oats, milk, and apple.
children.meal_suggestion: Dairy-free option: use fortified plant milk. Boost protein by adding a tablespoon of nut butter or a sprinkle of chia/flax seeds. If extra sweetness is desired, drizzle honey or maple syrup. Top with extra sliced apple or a pinch more cinnamon for aroma.
children.nutrition_note: Oats supply soluble fiber (beta-glucan) for fullness; milk provides protein and calcium; apple adds vitamins and natural sweetness; cinnamon enhances flavor with minimal added sugar. A balanced, warming breakfast; adjust dairy or sweetness as needed.

children.name: Ricotta Toast — Berry Boost Variation
children.short_description: Ricotta toast with berries and a light honey drizzle—fiber-rich and protein-boosted for a quick, balanced meal.
children.meal_suggestion: Toast the whole-grain bread, spread ricotta, top with berries, and drizzle honey. Optional: sprinkle a pinch of cinnamon for extra flavor.
children.nutrition_note: Protein from ricotta; fiber from whole-grain bread and berries; natural sugars from honey and berries. A quick, balanced option—adjust honey to control sugar intake.

children.name: Miso Breakfast Set — Classic Set
children.short_description: Protein-forward Japanese-inspired breakfast featuring miso, tofu, egg, green onion, and rice.
children.meal_suggestion: Prepare a warm miso broth and add tofu cubes and green onion; gently add or scramble an egg and cook to preferred doneness, then serve over steamed rice. Garnish with extra green onion for freshness.
children.nutrition_note: Protein-rich breakfast with tofu and egg, balanced by rice; provides energy from carbohydrates and healthy fats. Contains soy and is potentially high in sodium due to miso. For lower sodium, choose low-sodium miso and moderate portions.

context_trace.description: Matched agg_exists(Meal[atom(content =~ "Smoky Base Pork")]) on Day 2 (Score: 0.50)

children.name: Fruit & Nut Plate — Smoky Combo
children.short_description: A balanced snack of mixed fruit, yogurt, and nuts delivering fiber, protein, and healthy fats.
children.meal_suggestion: Assemble a serving with 1 cup mixed fruit, ¼–½ cup plain Greek yogurt, and a small handful (about ¼ cup) nuts; enjoy as a portable, balanced snack and adjust portions to fit your daily needs.
children.nutrition_note: Provides fiber and antioxidants from fruit, protein and calcium from yogurt, and healthy fats from nuts. To keep sugar and calories in check, choose plain yogurt and unsalted nuts.

children.name: Overnight Oats — Citrus Fresh Twist
children.short_description: Creamy overnight oats with milk, plain yogurt, apple and cinnamon; a protein- and fiber-rich breakfast that can be brightened with a citrus note.
children.meal_suggestion: For a true Citrus Fresh Twist, add citrus zest (orange or lemon) or a small splash of juice to brighten the oats. Top with chopped nuts or seeds for healthy fats and extra crunch. Consider vanilla yogurt or a touch of vanilla extract for depth.
children.nutrition_note: Balanced breakfast with protein and calcium from yogurt and milk, plus fiber from oats and apple. No added sugar in the base ingredients; cinnamon adds flavor and may support blood sugar regulation. Calories vary with dairy choices but it's a filling, nutrient-dense start to the day.

children.name: Whole-Grain Pancakes — Citrus Fresh Variation
children.short_description: Whole-grain pancakes with egg, milk, berries, and maple syrup—fiber-rich, protein-containing breakfast with natural sweetness.
children.meal_suggestion: Serve with a small yogurt or extra berries for added protein or fiber. To echo the citrus theme, garnish with orange zest or add a splash of citrus juice to the batter.
children.nutrition_note: Fiber-rich whole-wheat batter with egg and milk provides sustained energy and high-quality protein; berries add vitamins, fiber, and antioxidants; maple syrup adds sweetness with natural sugars. The Citrus Fresh Variation name suggests optional citrus zest or juice for extra vitamin C and bright flavor, not included in the base ingredients.

children.name: Breakfast Wrap — Citrus Fresh Bake
children.short_description: A quick, balanced breakfast wrap with a whole-wheat tortilla, egg, turkey, spinach, and salsa.
children.meal_suggestion: Pair with a piece of fruit (e.g., orange) for extra vitamin C, and consider a squeeze of lime or a bit of avocado for freshness. To reduce sodium, use low-sodium turkey and homemade salsa.
children.nutrition_note: Protein-rich from egg and turkey; fiber and micronutrients from whole-wheat tortilla and spinach; salsa adds flavor and vitamin C. Mind sodium: turkey and salsa can be high-sodium—choose low-sodium turkey or add extra veggies to boost volume.

children.name: Breakfast Wrap — Lemon-Herb Skillet
children.short_description: A warm breakfast wrap featuring a whole-wheat tortilla, scrambled egg, turkey slices, spinach, and salsa, cooked in a lemon-herb skillet.
children.meal_suggestion: A quick, balanced breakfast wrap with protein, fiber, and vegetables; pair with fruit or yogurt for a fuller morning meal.
children.nutrition_note: Protein-rich meal thanks to egg and turkey; fiber from whole-wheat tortilla and spinach; salsa adds flavor with minimal added sugar. Sodium can be modest-to-high depending on turkey and salsa—opt for low-sodium versions if needed. For more fiber, add extra greens or use a higher-fiber tortilla; for lower fat, use egg whites and a smaller tortilla.

children.name: Breakfast Wrap — Smoky Combo
children.short_description: Protein-packed breakfast wrap with egg, turkey, spinach, and salsa in a whole-wheat tortilla.
children.meal_suggestion: Suggestions: swap turkey for chicken or plant-based protein; add avocado for healthy fats; include additional colorful veggies (bell peppers, onions); use low-sodium salsa or serve as a bowl to vary texture.
children.nutrition_note: Protein-rich breakfast with egg and turkey, plus fiber from whole-wheat tortilla and spinach. Includes vegetables and salsa; watch sodium levels from turkey and salsa—choose low-sodium options or reduce added salt. Optional avocado adds healthy fats.

children.name: Banana Bread Toast — Sesame Combo
children.short_description: Banana bread toast topped with yogurt and berries for a protein-fiber balanced snack.
children.meal_suggestion: Toast a slice of banana bread; spread with Greek yogurt; top with fresh berries. If desired, sprinkle a small amount of sesame seeds for crunch and extra minerals.
children.nutrition_note: Protein: moderate from Greek yogurt; carbs from banana bread and berries; fiber from berries (and banana bread depending on recipe). Fat varies with yogurt type; watch added sugars in banana bread. This combo provides calcium and vitamins from dairy and fruit; suitable as a quick breakfast or snack.

children.name: Apple-Cinnamon Porridge — Maple-Kissed Variation
children.short_description: Creamy apple-cinnamon porridge made with oats and milk, with an optional maple-sweetened variation.
children.meal_suggestion: Serve warm as a comforting breakfast. For extra protein, top with yogurt or nuts; if you want the maple-kissed variation, swirl in a small amount of maple syrup.
children.nutrition_note: Fiber-rich oats and apple support fullness; milk adds protein and calcium; cinnamon adds flavor with minimal added sugar. Maple-kissed variation suggests a light maple sweetness—add maple syrup sparingly if desired.

children.name: Whole-Grain Pancakes — Mild-Spice Plate
children.short_description: Whole-grain pancakes with berries and maple syrup—fiber-rich, protein-present, and naturally sweet with a touch of mild spice.
children.meal_suggestion: Pair with Greek yogurt or additional berries for extra protein and fiber. Serve warm with a light drizzle of maple syrup; optionally add a pinch of cinnamon for a mild spice note.
children.nutrition_note: High-fiber, protein-containing plate from whole-wheat flour, egg, and milk; antioxidants from berries; natural sugars from maple syrup. To limit added sugars, drizzle sparingly and consider lighter syrup or fruit topping.

children.name: Miso Breakfast Set — Sesame Variation
children.short_description: Miso breakfast set with tofu, egg, green onion, rice, and optional sesame variation for a protein-packed savory morning meal.
children.meal_suggestion: Serve warm as a balanced bowl: mix in the tofu with a small amount of miso for flavor, top with green onion and a gently cooked egg, and accompany with steamed rice. If sesame variation is used, finish with toasted sesame seeds for extra texture; opt for low-sodium miso to keep sodium in check.
children.nutrition_note: Protein-rich breakfast from tofu and egg supports satiety and muscle maintenance. Includes rice for steady energy; miso provides fermentation-associated flavor and potential gut benefits. Sodium intake can be high from miso paste—consider low-sodium miso if needed. Sesame variation may add healthy fats and a nutty flavor if sesame is used.

children.name: Breakfast Sandwich — Sesame Bowl
children.short_description: A savory breakfast sandwich on a whole-wheat English muffin with egg, cheddar, and tomato.
children.meal_suggestion: Quick, balanced breakfast. To adjust: add another egg or more cheese for extra protein; use egg whites and light cheese to lower calories; choose a higher-fiber muffin to boost fiber.
children.nutrition_note: Approx 320–420 kcal; protein 15–20 g; carbs 30–40 g; fat 9–12 g. Fiber from the whole-wheat muffin; tomato adds micronutrients. Sodium varies with cheese; consider lower-sodium cheddar to reduce salt.

children.name: Breakfast Wrap — Smoky Variation
children.short_description: Smoky breakfast wrap with egg, turkey, spinach in a whole-wheat tortilla and salsa.
children.meal_suggestion: For lower sodium, use low-sodium turkey and salsa; add avocado for healthy fats to enhance fullness and flavor.
children.nutrition_note: Balanced breakfast wrap with lean protein (turkey and egg) and fiber from whole-wheat tortilla and spinach. Monitor sodium from turkey and salsa; consider low-sodium options if needed.
